text.message: Nah can’t trade with you at this point
Blue is a road from 9 no?
I love the test your devs line
I didn’t have an easy way to
Better pray blue doesn’t have a vp here
If you have a vp it’s a single road to win
So no blue definitely wins with road
Maybe I’m not the unilateral rob?
I have all sheep and wheat
All my wood got stolen twice
